Chronology of every recorded fact about [[gold light (The Traveler's Gate Trilogy)]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Alin can fill his hand with shining golden light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — The Gold Light can ask questions to Alin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — The Gold Light is a type of light within Alin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Alin can summon Gold Light to fill his palms with destructive power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — Gold Light can be used to create a golden blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — Gold Light can be hurled as blasts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — The Gold Light is a madra Alin can use.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — The Gold Light is a voice that can rage at Alin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — The Gold Light told Alin he let them get away!}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — The Gold Light cried out for victory in Alin's heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Alin was prepared to unleash Gold Light.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
